description: Quantum-X800 InfiniBand 800Gb/s AI Fabric、Spectrum-X東西向交換及南北向生產網設計與維運。
description_en: Design and operate the Quantum-X800 InfiniBand 800Gb/s AI Fabric, Spectrum-X east-west switching, and north-south production network.
description_zh-Hans: Quantum-X800 InfiniBand 800Gb/s AI Fabric、Spectrum-X东西向交换及南北向生产网设计与维运。
